text: I feel suspended between worlds: the structured, collective focus of the seminar and the abstract, introspective space of the exhibit. In one, I am part of an audience—a participant in a flow of ideas—while in the other, I float in conceptual ambiguity, surrounded by refracted knowledge and the gentle hum of inquiry. There’s curiosity in both—one outward, one inward. I feel a bit dislocated, yet alive to the possibilities that such liminal spaces offer for reflection and connection.
